command:
set -e
mkdir -p testdir
# Test that the directory passes access() checks for read/write
# The 'test -r' and 'test -w' commands call access() with R_OK and W_OK
test -r testdir && echo 'READ_OK'
test -w testdir && echo 'WRITE_OK'
test -x testdir && echo 'EXEC_OK'
test -d testdir && echo 'IS_DIR'
# Now actually use the directory
echo 'test content' > testdir/file.txt
cat testdir/file.txt
rm testdir/file.txt
rmdir testdir
echo 'ACCESS_TEST_PASSED'
